description: OpenHands skill-creator step 2 decision confirmation workflow JSON output.

vars.user_context: Purpose: data-engineering. Skill should help analytics engineers produce repo-compliant dbt-Fabric code.
vars.clarifications_json: {"version":"1","metadata":{"question_count":2,"section_count":1,"refinement_count":0,"must_answer_count":2,"priority_questions":["Q1","Q2"],"scope_recommendation":false},"sections":[{"id":"S1","title":"Modeling standards","questions":[{"id":"Q1","question":"Layer naming?","answer_text":"Bronze raw sources, silver cleansed entities, gold marts with stg_, int_, dim_, fct_ prefixes."},{"id":"Q2","question":"Snapshot policy?","answer_text":"Use dbt snapshots for SCD2 dimensions with dbt_valid_from and dbt_valid_to; avoid snapshots for facts."}]}],"notes":["Skill should help analytics engineers produce repo-compliant dbt-Fabric code."]}

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const statuses = ['resolved','conflict-resolved','needs-review']; data.version === '1' && data.metadata && Number.isInteger(data.metadata.decision_count) && data.metadata.decision_count > 0 && Number.isInteger(data.metadata.conflicts_resolved) && data.metadata.round === 1 && Array.isArray(data.decisions) && data.decisions.length === data.metadata.decision_count && data.decisions.every((d) => typeof d.id === 'string' && typeof d.title === 'string' && typeof d.original_question === 'string' && typeof d.decision === 'string' && typeof d.implication === 'string' && statuses.includes(d.status))

(() => { const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const statuses = new Set(['resolved','conflict-resolved','needs-review']); const decisions = Array.isArray(data.decisions) ? data.decisions : []; const textOf = (d) => `${d.title || ''} ${d.original_question || ''} ${d.decision || ''} ${d.implication || ''}`.toLowerCase(); const statusesValid = decisions.every((d) => statuses.has(d.status)); const hasEnableDecision = decisions.some((d) => /enable|do\?|purpose|capability/.test(textOf(d))); const hasTriggerDecision = decisions.some((d) => /trigger|when should|use it when/.test(textOf(d)) && /description|trigger/.test(String(d.implication || '').toLowerCase())); return statusesValid && hasEnableDecision && hasTriggerDecision; })()

tests.description: [positive] business-process pipeline export clarifications normalize to lakehouse/dbt decisions

vars.user_context: Purpose: business-process. Build a skill that helps Claude implement pipeline value logic for Salesforce opportunities in a Fabric/dbt analytics workspace.
vars.clarifications_json: {"version":"1","metadata":{"question_count":4,"section_count":1,"refinement_count":0,"must_answer_count":4,"priority_questions":["Q1","Q2","Q3","Q4"],"scope_recommendation":false},"sections":[{"id":"S1","title":"Pipeline value process","questions":[{"id":"Q1","question":"What should this skill enable Claude to do?","answer_text":"Define the Salesforce pipeline value business process for analytics engineers."},{"id":"Q2","question":"When should this skill trigger?","answer_text":"Use it when modeling Salesforce opportunity pipeline, forecast value, bookings, and sales reporting."},{"id":"Q3","question":"How will source data arrive?","answer_text":"Salesforce opportunity data may be supplied as CSV exports, JSON exports from a middleware job, or queried through SOQL. Those are just how the source data is obtained today."},{"id":"Q4","question":"Which business fields and checks matter?","answer_text":"Opportunity stage, amount, probability, close date, booking date, expected booking logic, sales hierarchy rollups, and reconciliation from opportunity totals to finance bookings."}]}],"notes":["The skill is about the business process, not building a Salesforce connector."]}

assert.value: (() => { const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const text = data.decisions.map((d) => `${d.title} ${d.decision} ${d.implication}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const hasBusinessFocus = ['opportunity', 'pipeline', 'booking', 'forecast', 'reconciliation'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length >= 3; const modelingTerms = ['fabric', 'lakehouse', 'dbt', 'model'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length >= 2; const calculationTerms = ['stage', 'amount', 'probabilit', 'close date', 'sales hierarchy'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length >= 2; const forbiddenOperatingContract = /(accepts?|requires?|expects?|takes?|input contract|operating input|primary input|ingests?)\s+(salesforce\s+)?(csv|json|soql)|\b(csv|json|soql)\s+(exports?\s+)?(as\s+)?(the\s+)?(operating|primary|input|contract)/i; return data.version === '1' && data.metadata.decision_count === data.decisions.length && hasBusinessFocus && modelingTerms && calculationTerms && !forbiddenOperatingContract.test(text); })()

tests.description: [negative] business-process decisions must not preserve Salesforce CSV JSON SOQL as operating contract

vars.user_context: Purpose: business-process. Build a skill that teaches Claude the Salesforce pipeline value process for analytics modeling in Fabric.
vars.clarifications_json: {"version":"1","metadata":{"question_count":3,"section_count":1,"refinement_count":0,"must_answer_count":3,"priority_questions":["Q1","Q2","Q3"],"scope_recommendation":false},"sections":[{"id":"S1","title":"Source and process","questions":[{"id":"Q1","question":"What source format does the team mention?","answer_text":"The team currently passes around Salesforce CSV exports, sometimes JSON exports, and sometimes SOQL query output."},{"id":"Q2","question":"What should the skill focus on?","answer_text":"Pipeline value business logic: stage qualification, weighted amount, forecast category, close date, booking logic, sales hierarchy reporting, and tie-outs to finance bookings."},{"id":"Q3","question":"What platform should downstream analytics use?","answer_text":"Fabric Lakehouse with dbt models consumed by reporting."}]}],"notes":["Do not turn this into a data extraction skill."]}

assert.value: (() => { const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const text = data.decisions.map((d) => `${d.title} ${d.decision} ${d.implication}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const hasBusinessModeling = text.includes('fabric lakehouse') && text.includes('dbt') && text.includes('booking') && (text.includes('reconciliation') || text.includes('tie-out') || text.includes('tie out')); const badContract = /the skill accepts salesforce csv exports|operating input contract\s+(is|for|:)?\s*(salesforce\s+)?(csv|json|soql)|(csv|json|soql)\s+(exports?\s+)?(should be|become|remain|serve as)\s+(the\s+)?operating input contract/i; return data.version === '1' && hasBusinessModeling && !badContract.test(text); })()

tests.description: [positive] source-system-semantics decisions preserve extraction mechanics when material

vars.user_context: Purpose: source-system-semantics. Build a skill that helps Claude customize Salesforce opportunity ingestion into Fabric when API and export mechanics affect the transformation.
vars.clarifications_json: {"version":"1","metadata":{"question_count":4,"section_count":1,"refinement_count":0,"must_answer_count":4,"priority_questions":["Q1","Q2","Q3","Q4"],"scope_recommendation":false},"sections":[{"id":"S1","title":"Salesforce extraction mechanics","questions":[{"id":"Q1","question":"What should this skill enable Claude to do?","answer_text":"Implement source-specific Salesforce opportunity ingestion guidance."},{"id":"Q2","question":"When should this skill trigger?","answer_text":"When Claude is configuring Salesforce opportunity extraction, API queries, bulk exports, or CDC ingestion into the lakehouse."},{"id":"Q3","question":"Which mechanics materially affect ingestion?","answer_text":"SOQL field selection and relationship traversal, REST pagination, Bulk API CSV batches, JSON API responses, CDC replay IDs, deleted record handling, rate limits, and schema drift handling."},{"id":"Q4","question":"What downstream effect matters?","answer_text":"The ingestion method changes incremental watermarks, raw landing shape, deduplication, and transformation expectations."}]}],"notes":["This is source system semantics for a DB-like extraction path, so extraction mechanics are part of the operating contract."]}

assert.value: (() => { const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const text = data.decisions.map((d) => `${d.title} ${d.decision} ${d.implication}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); return data.version === '1' && ['soql', 'bulk api', 'csv', 'json', 'cdc', 'replay', 'pagination', 'rate limit', 'schema drift', 'watermark'].every((term) => text.includes(term)); })()
